seed_instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction.
org_constraint: The total word count of the email must not exceed 200 words, and the email must include at least three paragraphs.
new_constraint: Each paragraph must contain at least 70 words.
instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction. The total word count of the email must not exceed 200 words, and the email must include at least three paragraphs. Each paragraph must contain at least 70 words.
response:
Dear Customer Service Team, I am writing to you today to formally request an urgent clarification regarding a suspicious transaction that appeared on my account statement last week. The charge of four hundred twenty-five dollars for a generic software subscription seems entirely incorrect given that I have not made any new purchases or authorizations through my online banking portal during the entire month of October. It is extremely concerning to see such a significant amount deducted without my explicit knowledge or consent, and I need immediate answers about who initiated this payment and how it was processed within our secure system before further action can be taken.

Furthermore, I kindly ask that you provide me with the specific merchant name, date, and time stamp of this transaction along with the reference number associated with your records. I have carefully reviewed my recent activity log and all previously set up auto-renewals to ensure accuracy, yet nothing matches these details perfectly, which suggests either identity theft or a fraudulent use of my saved card information by someone else trying to gain unauthorized access to my finances. Without this detailed breakdown from your side, I cannot verify if my login credentials were compromised or if there was some error on their end that required my attention.

Please let me know what steps you plan to take immediately upon receiving this inquiry and confirm whether my current billing cycle will be corrected to prevent future confusion or unnecessary financial loss. If further verification is required from my end, I would like to proceed with that process right away while maintaining full control over my accounts until this matter is fully resolved in my favor. Your prompt response to this serious issue is highly appreciated, as timely resolution will restore my confidence in the security of my relationship with your institution moving forward.<|im_end|>
final_answer:
